info.title: Graph Mail and Calendar
info.description: Microsoft Graph connector for Outlook mail and calendar operations including sending, searching, replying, scheduling meetings, managing events, and checking availability.

post.summary: Invoke Graph Mail and Calendar MCP
post.description: Sends JSON-RPC requests to invoke Microsoft Graph mail and calendar tools via MCP for Copilot Studio integration.

get.description: Retrieve messages from the signed-in user's mailbox. Supports keyword search, OData filter, ordering, and field selection.

post.description: Create a new draft message in the signed-in user's mailbox.

get.description: Get a specific message by ID from the signed-in user's mailbox.

patch.description: Update properties of a message (subject, body, categories, importance, isRead).

delete.description: Delete a message from the signed-in user's mailbox.

post.description: Send an existing draft message.
Reply to the sender of a message with a comment.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The message ID to reply to

post.description: Reply to all recipients of a message.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The message ID to reply all to

post.description: Forward a message to specified recipients.
Move a message to a different mail folder.

destinationId.description: The ID of the destination folder, or well-known name (inbox, drafts, sentitems, deleteditems, archive)

post.description: Copy a message to a folder.

destinationId.description: The ID of the destination folder, or well-known name (inbox, drafts, sentitems, deleteditems, archive)

post.description: Create a draft reply to a message. Edit the draft then send via Send Draft.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The ID of the message to reply to

comment.description: Optional comment to include in the reply

message.description: Optional overrides for the reply message

post.description: Create a draft reply-all to a message. Edit the draft then send via Send Draft.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The ID of the message to reply-all to

comment.description: Optional comment to include in the reply-all

post.description: Create a draft forward of a message. Add recipients and modify the draft before sending via Send Draft.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The ID of the message to forward

comment.description: Optional comment to include in the forward

toRecipients.description: Recipients to forward the message to

get.description: List all attachments on a message.

post.description: Add a file attachment to a draft message. Provide base64-encoded content.

get.description: Get a specific attachment on a message including metadata and base64 content.

delete.description: Delete an attachment from a draft message.

get.description: Download the raw content of a file attachment.

post.description: Send a new email as the signed-in user.
Get MailTips for one or more recipients, including out-of-office status, mailbox full, delivery restrictions, and custom tips.

EmailAddresses.description: Email addresses to get tips for

MailTipsOptions.description: Comma-separated: automaticReplies, mailboxFullStatus, customMailTip, deliveryRestriction, externalMemberCount, maxMessageSize, moderationStatus, recipientScope, totalMemberCount

get.description: Get properties of a specific mail folder by ID. Use well-known folder names: inbox, drafts, sentitems, deleteditems, junkemail, archive.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Mail folder ID or well-known name (inbox, drafts, sentitems, deleteditems, junkemail, archive)

patch.description: Update properties of a mail folder such as renaming it.

displayName.description: New display name for the folder

delete.description: Delete a mail folder and its contents.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: The mail folder ID to delete

get.description: List the child (sub) folders of a specific mail folder.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: The parent mail folder ID or well-known name

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of child folders to return

get.description: List messages in a specific mail folder. Supports search, filter, and OData parameters.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Mail folder ID or well-known name (inbox, drafts, sentitems, deleteditems, junkemail, archive)

post.description: Create a draft message directly in a specific mail folder.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: The folder ID or well-known name

get.description: List mail folders in the signed-in user's mailbox.

post.description: Create a new mail folder in the user's mailbox.

displayName.description: The name of the new mail folder

get.description: Get all the messageRule objects defined for the user's inbox.

post.description: Create a message rule for the user's inbox by specifying conditions and actions.

get.description: Get the properties and relationships of a message rule.

parameters.name: ruleId
parameters.description: The ID of the message rule

patch.description: Update the properties of a message rule.

parameters.name: ruleId
parameters.description: The ID of the message rule

parameters.name: ruleId
parameters.description: The ID of the message rule to delete

get.description: List messages in the signed-in user's Sent Items folder.

post.description: Search Outlook messages using Microsoft Graph Search API with KQL (Keyword Query Language) queries. Searches across subject, body, and attachments.

get.description: List calendar events for the signed-in user. Supports keyword search, OData filter, and ordering.

post.description: Create a new calendar event. Supports attendees, Teams meetings, recurring events, and all-day events.

get.description: Get a specific calendar event by ID.

post.description: Accept a meeting invitation.
Decline a meeting invitation.
Tentatively accept a meeting invitation.
Cancel a meeting and notify attendees.
Snooze the reminder for an event and reschedule it to a new time.

newReminderTime.description: The new date and time to trigger the reminder

timeZone.description: Time zone (e.g. Pacific Standard Time, UTC)

post.description: Dismiss the reminder for an event.

get.description: Get the instances (occurrences) of a recurring event for a specified time range.
List all attachments on a calendar event.

post.description: Add a file attachment to a calendar event.

get.description: Get a specific attachment on a calendar event.

delete.description: Delete an attachment from a calendar event.

parameters.name: attachmentId
parameters.description: The ID of the attachment to delete

get.description: Get calendar events within a specific date/time range, including recurring event occurrences.

post.description: Suggest meeting times based on organizer and attendee availability, constraints, and preferences.
Get the free/busy availability schedule for users, distribution lists, or resources.

schedules.description: SMTP addresses of users or resources to check

timeZone.description: Time zone (e.g. Pacific Standard Time, UTC)
Time zone (e.g. Pacific Standard Time, UTC)

get.description: List all calendars for the signed-in user.

post.description: Create a new calendar for the signed-in user.

color.description: Color theme (auto, lightBlue, lightGreen, lightOrange, lightGray, lightYellow, lightTeal, lightPink, lightBrown, lightRed, maxColor)

get.description: Get properties of a specific calendar.

patch.description: Update properties of a calendar (name, color).

delete.description: Delete a secondary calendar. Cannot delete the default calendar.

get.description: Retrieve the profile of the signed-in user.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Expand related entity: manager or directReports (only one per request)

get.description: Retrieve the manager of the signed-in user.
List the direct reports of the signed-in user.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of direct reports to return

get.description: Get the metadata for the signed-in user's profile photo, including dimensions and content type.
Get a collection of person objects ordered by relevance to the signed-in user (based on communication, collaboration, and business relationships).

parameters.name: $search
parameters.description: Search people by name or email

get.description: Retrieve a specific user's profile by object ID (GUID) or userPrincipalName (UPN).

parameters.name: userIdentifier
parameters.description: User object ID (GUID) or userPrincipalName (UPN). Do not use 'me'.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Expand: manager or directReports (only one per request)

get.description: Retrieve the manager of a specified user by object ID or UPN.

parameters.name: userIdentifier
parameters.description: User object ID (GUID) or userPrincipalName (UPN). Do not use 'me'.

get.description: List the direct reports of a specified user.

parameters.name: userIdentifier
parameters.description: User object ID (GUID) or userPrincipalName (UPN). Do not use 'me'.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of direct reports to return

get.description: List users in the organization. Supports search, filter, and ordering. ConsistencyLevel is set to eventual for advanced queries.

parameters.name: $search
parameters.description: Free-text search (format: "displayName:John"). Requires ConsistencyLevel: eventual header.

parameters.name: ConsistencyLevel
parameters.description: Set to 'eventual' for advanced queries (required for $search)

get.description: List messages from a specific user's mailbox.
Get a specific message from another user's mailbox.

post.description: Send mail on behalf of another user.

get.description: List calendar events from a specific user's calendar.
Get a specific event from another user's calendar.
Get calendar events within a specific date range for another user.

timeZone.description: Time zone (e.g. Pacific Standard Time, UTC)

type.description: daily, weekly, absoluteMonthly, relativeMonthly, absoluteYearly, relativeYearly

daysOfWeek.description: Days of the week (sunday, monday, etc.)

saveToSentItems.description: Save to Sent Items folder (default true)

sendResponse.description: Whether to send a response to the organizer (default true)

timeZone.description: Time zone (e.g. Pacific Standard Time, UTC)
Time zone (e.g. Pacific Standard Time, UTC)

type.description: daily, weekly, absoluteMonthly, relativeMonthly, absoluteYearly, relativeYearly

meetingDuration.description: Duration in ISO 8601 format (e.g. PT1H, PT30M)

subjectContains.description: Strings in subject that trigger rule

bodyContains.description: Strings in body that trigger rule

senderContains.description: Strings in sender address that trigger rule

actions.description: Actions to perform when conditions are met

moveToFolder.description: Folder ID to move message to

copyToFolder.description: Folder ID to copy message to

scopes.User.Read: Sign in and read user profile
